title: Robbie Mulhern
description: England & Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Robert "Robbie" Mulhern (born 18 October 1994) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop for the Leigh Leopards in the Super League. Mulhern has represented Ireland, England and the England Knights at international level.
He has previously played for the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League, and on loan from Leeds at the Hunslet Hawks in the Championship. Mulhern also played for the Warrington Wolves and Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League and the Championship, and on loan from Hull KR at Newcastle Thunder in League 1.
